steps.title: Spot the core requirement
steps.content: The prompt asks for an EXAMPLE of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname—the answer must name a specific nickname, not just discuss that nicknames exist.

steps.title: Match the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
C directly names the specific nickname (Wyrex) and identifies it as a Tyrannosaurus specimen at the Houston Museum of Natural Science.

A and B mention nicknames without naming a specific one, while D describes the specimen but omits its nickname.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
